Title: Install and prove Odoo Copilot end-to-end on canonical local/dev baseline
Description: Install and verify ipai_odoo_copilot on the canonical odoo_dev baseline and prove the core user flow inside Odoo, including bounded Copilot actions and visible UI entry points.
Acceptance Criteria: ipai_odoo_copilot is installed or upgraded on odoo_dev.; Copilot UI entry points are visible on the agreed target models.; A basic ask-copilot flow works end to end.; Evidence captures show the feature working on the canonical local/dev baseline.; Any missing dependency or asset issues are resolved.

Title: Freeze Odoo Copilot capability contract for informational, navigational, and transactional intents
Description: Define the user-facing capability contract for Odoo Copilot using the benchmark pattern of informational, navigational, and transactional capabilities, including explicit non-goals and approval boundaries.
Acceptance Criteria: Capability matrix is documented.; Informational, navigational, and transactional intents are explicitly defined.; Non-goals and unsupported scenarios are documented.; High-risk transactional actions are marked proposal-first.; Product-facing language is consistent across docs and demos.

Title: Publish Foundry Odoo Copilot agent to a stable application endpoint
Description: Publish the Odoo Copilot Foundry agent as a managed agent application with a stable endpoint, versioning contract, and authentication model suitable for downstream packaging and integration.
Acceptance Criteria: Foundry agent is published as an application.; Stable endpoint and auth mode are documented.; Agent versioning contract exists.; Odoo can call the published endpoint successfully.; Deployment and rollback notes are captured.

Title: Package Odoo Copilot for Microsoft 365 / Teams distribution path
Description: Create the supported Microsoft 365 / Teams packaging path for Odoo Copilot so it can be distributed privately first and then through the Microsoft Commercial Marketplace if desired.
Acceptance Criteria: Supported packaging approach is selected and documented.; App/agent manifest package exists.; Package installs cleanly in a private tenant or org catalog.; Auth and launch flow are validated.; Required icons and metadata placeholders exist.

Title: Define bounded Foundry tool contract for Odoo Copilot Marketplace path
Description: Define and implement the bounded tool surface used by Foundry agents when acting on Odoo context, ensuring no unrestricted ORM or database mutation paths are exposed.
Acceptance Criteria: Allowed tools are documented and implemented.; Tool inputs and outputs are versioned.; No unrestricted DB or ORM mutation access is exposed.; Tool calls are logged with correlation IDs.; Security review signs off on the bounded access model.

Title: Create Marketplace quality and eval pack for Odoo Copilot
Description: Build the quality pack for Odoo Copilot covering helpfulness, grounding, OCR interpretation quality, action safety, and human approval yield to support Marketplace readiness and internal release gates.
Acceptance Criteria: Eval cases are defined for the initial scenarios.; Quality thresholds are documented.; Regression run can be repeated after prompt or agent changes.; Approval yield and edit/reject rates are captured.; Results can be attached to release evidence.

Title: Define canonical OCR normalization and Odoo writeback contract
Description: Define the normalized OCR payload and writeback contract used between Document Intelligence, Foundry interpretation, and Odoo review models so Marketplace-facing behavior is stable and supportable.
Acceptance Criteria: Normalized OCR schema is documented and versioned.; Odoo writeback consumes only the normalized schema.; Confidence, review recommendation, and extraction metadata are explicit.; Failure and retry semantics are documented.; Contract is implemented in code and test-covered.

Title: Publish privacy, data handling, and boundary documentation for Odoo Copilot
Description: Create the public-facing privacy, data handling, retention, and product-boundary documentation required to support Marketplace listing and customer trust for Odoo Copilot.
Acceptance Criteria: Privacy and data-processing scope is documented.; Retention and storage boundaries are documented.; Sensitive-data handling guidance exists.; Product boundary and review disclaimers are documented.; Support/privacy links are ready for listing use.

Title: Create admin onboarding and tenant configuration guide for Microsoft 365 / Teams deployment
Description: Create the admin onboarding guide and tenant configuration contract for deploying Odoo Copilot into Microsoft 365 / Teams environments before Marketplace submission.
Acceptance Criteria: Admin onboarding steps are documented.; Required tenant/app settings are documented.; Support flow for deployment issues is defined.; Private deployment can be executed repeatably.; Prerequisites are explicit.

Title: Wire production-grade identity, secrets, ingress, and observability for Odoo Copilot runtime
Description: Finalize the production-grade infrastructure contract for Odoo Copilot, including secret handling, identity, ingress, monitoring, tracing, and runtime reachability across Odoo, Foundry, and OCR services.
Acceptance Criteria: Identity and secret flow is documented and implemented.; Endpoint and ingress map is documented.; Monitoring and tracing are available for the critical flows.; Health checks validate external service reachability.; Production wiring is evidenced.

Title: Define SLOs and baseline performance evidence for Odoo Copilot and OCR flows
Description: Define and measure baseline responsiveness, availability, and error-rate targets for Odoo Copilot and OCR workflows to support Marketplace quality and supportability expectations.
Acceptance Criteria: SLO/SLA targets are documented.; Baseline latency and reliability evidence exists.; Smoke and health checks cover the critical user journeys.; Error budget or equivalent tolerance is defined.; Results are included in release evidence.

Title: Prepare Partner Center offer draft and Marketplace submission asset pack
Description: Prepare the Partner Center offer draft and the submission asset pack for Odoo Copilot, including listing copy, screenshots, support links, privacy links, categories, and certification checklist coverage.
Acceptance Criteria: Partner Center offer draft exists.; Listing copy and screenshots are prepared.; Support and privacy links are finalized.; Categories and metadata are selected.; Submission checklist is completed.

Title: Create Marketplace certification and review plan for first submission
Description: Create the certification and review plan for the first Marketplace submission, including timeline, expected review iterations, owner assignments, and response workflow for certification feedback.
Acceptance Criteria: Submission timeline is documented.; Review owners are assigned.; Expected iteration workflow is documented.; Certification backlog structure exists.; Buffer for first-submission review is planned.
